page.title: Role assignment
page.subtitle: Generate a random loop-free role assignment chain.
page.sr_description: Assign roles — generate a random loop-free chain where each person gets a next person, a place, and a tool.

error.places_only: Need {count} more place(s) to cover all {names} names.
error.tools_only: Need {count} more tool(s) to cover all {names} names.
error.both: Need {places} more place(s) and/or {tools} more tool(s) to cover all {names} names.

warning.places_only: You have {count} unused place(s) — they won't all be assigned.
warning.tools_only: You have {count} unused tool(s) — they won't all be assigned.
warning.both: You have {places} unused place(s) and/or {tools} unused tool(s) — they won't all be assigned.

card.done_aria: {name} — click to mark as written down
